__inputs.name: DS_PROMETHEUS
__inputs.label: Prometheus
__inputs.description: Prometheus instance scraping the bot exporter on port 8000/metrics

dashboard.title: Polymarket AI Bot — Full Analytics
dashboard.description: P&L, risk-adjusted returns, drawdown, signal processors, ML engine, order flow. Source: monitoring/metrics_exporter.py @ port 8000.

panels.title: Sortino Ratio
panels.description: Like Sharpe but only penalises downside volatility.

panels.title: Calmar Ratio
panels.description: Annualised ROI ÷ max drawdown. High = good recovery.

panels.title: Kelly Fraction
panels.description: Optimal bet fraction 0–0.5. Use half-Kelly in practice.

panels.title: Recovery Factor
panels.description: Net P&L ÷ max drawdown USD. > 1 = fully recovered.

panels.title: Profit Factor
panels.description: Gross profit ÷ gross loss. > 1.25 is healthy.

panels.title: ML Edge Score
panels.description: ML predicted edge vs Polymarket market price. Positive = favourable bet.

panels.title: ML p(UP)
panels.description: XGBoost predicted probability that BTC resolves UP.

panels.title: Fusion Score & ML Edge vs time
Order entry price & size over time
Win rate & max drawdown vs time
